rationale: The cited paper is used in a single grouped, background-style citation (with Veblen) to support a general statement that status-goods value depends on who consumes the good. In the citing paper, the core contribution is a new multiperiod model of ranking-publication incentives and student viewing/choice behavior, and that analysis is not developed from Kuksov and Xie (2012). There is no clear reuse or direct extension of the cited paper's specific framework, mechanism, or evidence in the main model or results.
